title: Tetrion Easy Spray Chalky Effects Hessian Spray Paint - Quick Dry Chalk Finish for Wood, Metal, Ceramic & Plastic – Create Elegant Home Decor 400 ml (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
VERSATILE CHALKY FINISH: Achieve a timeless matte effect on wood, metal, ceramic, and plastic Ideal for home décor, crafts, upcycling projects and more
QUICK DRYING: Experience fast-drying convenience; touch dry in just 15 minutes ideal for completing projects efficiently with minimal downtime
SMOOTH APPLICATION: This easy-to-use spray paint ensures a seamless finish with minimal effort, making it suitable for beginners Professional results every time
SUITABLE FOR INDOOR & OUTDOOR USE: Enhance both indoor and outdoor spaces This durable spray paint is ideal for furniture and outdoor décor
ELEGANT COLOR RANGE: Choose from a variety of sophisticated, soft colors offering a refined, chalky finish that enhances the elegance of any project
